name: Ghostface Scorpion
value: ghostface stinger (Xu Qing consumed vs Vajra Patriarch); venom sac; chitinous shell
behaviorScript: Venomous Ambush — from BTT; burrows in corrupted soil; stinger carries potent venom that damages soul force; Xu Qing consumed its tail as a one-time weapon against Vajra Ancestor
threat: High (soul-damaging venom bypasses all physical/Qi defenses)
bodyMaterials: Ghostface Venom Sac (soul-damaging poison — black market commodity)
weaknesses: Fire-element techniques (scorpions are weak to heat)
knownEnemies: Xu Qing (consumed its tail as a weapon)
cultivationValue: Venom sacs are top-tier alchemical reagents for soul-targeting poisons and their antidotes
alchemyUses: Divine Sense Restoration Pill (requires diluted venom as catalyst)
knownInheritances: None — the scorpion is a natural creature, not an inheritance vessel
